description: Machine-readable catalog of all AI-Skills assets. Add an entry here every time you contribute a new asset.

assets.title: Summarize Pull Request for Reviewers
assets.description: Generates a concise, reviewer-friendly summary of a pull request from its title, description, and list of changed files.

assets.title: Incident Triage First-Responder Guide
assets.description: Guides the on-call engineer through structured incident triage by analysing alert details and recent changes to suggest probable root causes and immediate mitigation steps.

assets.title: Architecture Decision Record (ADR) Generator
assets.description: Generates a well-structured Architecture Decision Record (ADR) in the MADR format from a brief description of the decision context, options considered, and the chosen option.

assets.title: Generate Test Cases from User Story
assets.description: Generates a comprehensive set of test cases (happy path, edge cases, and negative scenarios) from a user story and its acceptance criteria, formatted as Gherkin scenarios.
